messages.text:
🚫 POSITION WITHDRAWN
MOCK: Alice Ace vs Bob Bruiser
Contract: Alice Ace YES
Reason: ask 47.0c crossed ABOVE the maximum acceptable price 45.0c; position withdrawn: ACTIONABLE EXPERIMENTAL -> NO BET
Previously suggested stake: 0.40%
This position no longer qualifies. If you placed it manually, that is your decision to review —
this system has no order path and cannot close anything.
Dashboard: http://localhost:4400/card/2026-07-18

📚 EVIDENCE UPDATE

CARD-LEVEL

The sealed forecast changed because the evidence changed:
• the sealed decision was re-run against a fresher snapshot

System range: 49.0%–54.0% (was 48.0%–55.0%)
Evidence coverage: see per-bout detail

Previous forecast: 25934d94862924a2 (superseded, not overwritten)
Current forecast: 1472cd7644fe6901

Dashboard: http://localhost:4400/card/2026-07-18

🔴 PIPELINE FAILURE

Stage: sportsbook snapshot (simulated for this test)
When: 2026-07-16T23:13:48.600Z

What happened: HTTP 503 from the odds source — the consensus could not be collected

Consequence: no live baseline, so no contract could be valued against a contemporaneous price. No decision advanced.

No positions were proposed from a failed run.
Alerts: DISARMED · Trading capability: NONE

📋 DAILY SHADOW SUMMARY

2026-07-16 — 1 card(s), 48 decisions

Actionable experimental: 0
Watch: 0
No bet: 24
Analysis only: 0
Unpriced: 0
Human review required: 0

No-bet frequency: 85.4%
Card exposure: $0 (cap $300)

Pipeline: GREEN

Alerts: DISARMED · Trading capability: NONE · Orders placed: 0

Dashboard: http://localhost:4400/

status.orderPlacementPath: does not exist in this build

sportsbookSnapshot.reason: no sportsbook snapshot supplied to this render

doesNotEstablish: MAKER fees. No maker example exists. `makerRate` has been REMOVED rather than left at an untested 0.0 — see below.
Settlement/exercise fees — a separate Kalshi line item the order ticket never displays.

Linearity in `contracts` at prices OTHER than 0.59. Size was varied at one price only, so the separable form k*C*P*(1-P) is measured on its two axes independently — linear in C at P=0.59, quadratic in P at C~111-165 — and the cross-term is inferred from separability rather than observed. A non-separable rival (an exponent on C that itself varies with P) is not excluded, though nothing suggests one.

The P=0.50 peak — the very figure that motivates this gate. Tested p(1-p) is 0.2419/0.2139/0.0979; the 0.2500 maximum is never observed. The '1.75c at 50c' number is interpolated from the fitted model, not measured.
Prices outside 0.59-0.89. Below 0.59 is covered only by the formula's own p<->1-p symmetry, which cannot validate itself.
The NO side. Symmetry makes NO@0.31 identical to YES@0.69 only if Kalshi bills side-agnostically, which no YES-only example tests.

Sizes below 82.37 contracts, where the ceil premium grows without bound as size shrinks: 1 contract at 0.50 costs $0.02 = 4.0% of notional vs 3.5% asymptotically. The premium is measured at the 82.37 floor (0.375% of the fee) but nothing below it is tested. NOTE: at a $5k bankroll the 0.5% cap proposes ~42 contracts, still below this floor and still correctly caveated; a $10k bankroll proposes ~85, which is inside.
Multi-fill ladders — the actual production path. priceOrder applies ONE ceil to the blended average price; every ticket is a single-price fill. Direction is not uniformly conservative.
Any series other than KXUFCFIGHT (other series carry different published rates), or any date other than 2026-07-16.
feeVerification.reviewProvenance: 2 of 3 independent adversarial lenses completed; the third failed on a retry cap and its small-size claims were manually reproduced, NOT independently reviewed. See docs/fee-verification-provenance.md.

status.indicatorMeaning: GREEN = the pipeline completed and every artifact reproduces. It does NOT mean a bet exists, and it is unrelated to whether any position is proposed.
